gold.title: Liquid Toggle
gold.reason: Top performer (392 downloads, 8 likes) with hardware-accelerated CSS, multi-color variants (active/success/warning/danger), and a liquid morphing animation — visually stunning on pricing or settings pages.

gold.title: Toggle Theme
gold.reason: Animated three-way theme switcher (system/light/dark) with framer-motion highlight indicator and 222 downloads — a polished, immediately deployable component that every SaaS navbar needs.

gold.title: Toolbar
gold.reason: 213 downloads — animated rich-text formatting toolbar with framer-motion, 12 formatting actions, active states, and tooltips. Elevates any SaaS editor or content-heavy page.

gold.title: Sky Toggle
gold.reason: 53 downloads — a visually unique day/night sky toggle with animated clouds, stars SVG, and styled-components — memorable and polished for hero sections or landing page delighters.

gold.title: Todo List Item
gold.reason: 87 downloads, 4 likes — animated swipe-to-reveal delete with framer-motion layout animations, drag gesture, and smooth completion transition; production-ready for task management SaaS UIs.

gold.title: Animated Theme Toggle
gold.reason: Motion-driven theme toggle with useMotionValue/useTransform for smooth icon morphing between sun and moon states — a refined, high-craft alternative to basic icon swaps.

gold.title: Shamayim Toggle Switch
gold.reason: Highly customisable toggle (16 pattern types, full color theming, mirrored mode, custom icons) — a premium showcase component that stands out in component libraries and marketing demos.

silver.title: Toggle
silver.reason: 171 downloads, 3 likes — clean minimal toggle using pure CSS sibling selectors with dark mode support. Solid and dependency-free but visually standard.

silver.title: Switch [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: 254 downloads, 4 likes — accessible switch built on react-aria with full keyboard/screen-reader support. Great for accessibility-conscious SaaS but not visually distinctive.

silver.title: Switch
silver.reason: 67 downloads — framer-motion spring-animated switch with a clean dark/light pill design. Polished feel but limited configurability.

silver.title: Bouncy Toggle
silver.reason: 31 downloads — press-scale bounce animation with label transition. Delightful micro-interaction suitable for settings or onboarding flows.

silver.title: Toggle
silver.reason: 29 downloads — multi-color SVG-based toggle with 8 color themes. Useful but essentially duplicates shugar__toggle-1 with minor differences.

silver.title: Toggle Nav
silver.reason: Responsive animated data-viz navigation toggle using @visx/responsive with wavy line backgrounds — creative but niche; best suited for analytics dashboards.

silver.title: Material Design 3 Switch
silver.reason: 26 downloads — faithful MD3 physics spring animation with CVA variants (primary/destructive/success/warning) and check/X icons. Valuable for Material-aligned design systems.

silver.title: Toggle Group
silver.reason: 213 downloads — the canonical shadcn Radix toggle group. High usage, solid baseline, but a direct primitive re-export with minimal enhancement.

silver.title: Elastic Toggle Switch
silver.reason: Framer-motion layout spring toggle — minimal but the elastic feel is smooth. Compact and easy to drop into any form.

silver.title: Toggle Switch
silver.reason: 30 downloads — styled-components inset-shadow toggle with smooth transition. Retro-tactile feel but styled-components dependency adds friction.

bronze.title: Toggle
bronze.reason: 4 downloads — react-aria-components + tailwind-variants toggle group. Functional but heavily library-dependent and indistinguishable from the base primitive.

bronze.title: Toggle Button [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: 10 downloads — CVA toggle button wrapping AriaToggleButton with data-state variants. Structural utility component, not visually distinctive.

bronze.title: Collapsible
bronze.reason: 10 downloads — thin Radix Collapsible wrapper with data-slot attributes. Not a toggle in the UI sense; purely a structural primitive re-export.

bronze.title: Toggle Group 1
bronze.reason: 7 downloads — Radix ToggleGroup wrapper with CVA variants. Near-identical to the official shadcn toggle-group with negligible differentiation.

bronze.title: Toggle 1
bronze.reason: 18 downloads — duplicates shugar__toggle with the same 8-color SVG approach. No meaningful distinction from its sibling file.

bronze.title: Toggle Group
bronze.reason: 0 downloads — raw @base-ui-components/react toggle group with default gray styling. Library-specific wrapper with no design polish.

bronze.title: Switch
bronze.reason: 0 downloads — the component code is actually a counter (increment/decrement buttons), not a switch at all. Misnamed and unusable as a toggle.

bronze.title: Star Wars Toggle Switch
bronze.reason: 11 downloads — novelty BB-8 themed toggle. Highly entertaining but too niche/branded for any real customer website redesign.
